description: A designed text/statement graphic (not a meme) on a solid royal-blue background, styled as an official DHS press card. A large red-and-white decorative quotation mark sits at the upper left, followed by a bold white title 'Joint DHS/FBI Statement on Reports of Drones in New Jersey'. The body is several white paragraphs of official text addressing the December 2024 New Jersey drone-sighting reports, stating there is no evidence the sightings pose a national security or public safety threat or have a foreign nexus, that many reported sightings appear to be lawfully operating manned aircraft, and that no confirmed drone sightings exist in restricted airspace. The DHS seal appears at the lower right with a thin red horizontal rule. The style is institutional and minimal -- a quote-card layout used to present an agency statement in a shareable social-media image rather than a propaganda/meme. Target audience is the general public and press seeking the official position on the drone reports.
notable_text: Joint DHS/FBI Statement on Reports of Drones in New Jersey; 'We have no evidence at this time that the reported drone sightings pose a national security or public safety threat or have a foreign nexus.'
